title: Dedupe Pod custom nodes: quarantine volume copies of image-baked packs at boot
description: Live-found via the MPI-192 debug door (2026-07-05): ComfyUI on a volume Pod loads FOUR packs TWICE — VHS, KJNodes, MpiNodes, LTXVideo exist baked in /opt/ComfyUI/custom_nodes AND as stale copies in /workspace/comfyui/custom_nodes (volume). Volume copies import LAST and OVERRIDE the image-pinned versions (version drift + ComfyUI's own 'Duplicate VHS install detected' error dialog). The volume custom_nodes scan is LOAD-BEARING (per-model packs + ComfyUI-GGUF live there — do NOT remove the scan). Fix = start.sh boot-time dedupe: quarantine any volume pack whose canonical twin is baked, using ComfyUI's `.disabled` dir-suffix convention. Ships via publish-runtime.sh (NO image rebuild). Full plan in plan.md — read it before implementing.
